mapper.select:
SELECT *, (SELECT lyr_nm FROM xeus.gis_lyr_list WHERE tbl_id = f_table_name)
FROM geometry_columns
WHERE f_table_schema IN ('public', 'xeus', 'draw', 'excel', 'shp')
AND f_table_name = #{fTableName}

select.if: SELECT 'CTV' || (case length((num + 1)::text)::integer when 1 then '000000' when 2 then '00000' when 3 then '0000' when 4 then '000' when 5 then '00' when 6 then '0' when 7 then '' end) || num + 1 AS val FROM generate_series( (SELECT coalesce(substring(max(mgr_no), 4)::numeric, 0) FROM xeus.asset_cctv), (SELECT coalesce(substring(max(mgr_no), 4)::numeric, 0) FROM xeus.asset_cctv) ) AS num;
